subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the blessed Tree! The praiseworthy services of that honored branch at the Sacred Threshold of the King [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع العزیز من الدوحه المبارکه خدمات آن فرع محمود را بعتبه مقدسه ملیک
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @prayer for prosperity, @praise and encouragement
